main.description: A reply within a topic. Nested threading is expressed via the optional 'parent' strongRef pointing at another comment in the same topic.

topic.description: The topic record this comment belongs to. Discovery path: '.topic.uri'.

parent.description: The comment being replied to, for nested threading. Omitted for top-level replies to the topic.

body.description: Comment body in Creaton forum markdown.

protectedBody.description: Encrypted comment body for a protected board. Must not be combined with body.

protectedAttachments.description: Logos-hosted encrypted attachments for a protected reply.

video.description: Optional HLS video stored on the author's PDS (public boards).
